name: Tiger Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine white chocolate and peanut butter over the top of a double boiler. Bring water to a boil in the bottom section.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook until the white chocolate and peanut butter melt completely, stirring constantly.
3. Spread the mixture onto a waxed paper-lined jelly roll pan that measures 15x10x1 inch.
4. Pour the melted semisweet chocolate over the peanut butter mixture and swirl it through with a knife.
5. Chill the pan until the mixture is firm.
6. Cut into pieces measuring 1-1/2 by 1 inch.
7. Store in the refrigerator. Yields about 6 dozen pieces.
